message:
Replace mouse-based amino acid hover with static property legend

Remove the AminoAcidHoverInfo component that required complex mouse
event tracking and replace it with a simpler, always-visible AALegend
component for amino acid property reference.

Why This Change:
The mouse hover detection required raw terminal escape sequence parsing
(SGR mouse mode with sequences like \x1b[<button;x;y;M) which was:
- Complex to maintain and debug
- Caused render instability during rapid mouse movement
- Required stdin event listeners that competed with Ink's input handling
- Only worked in amino acid view mode anyway

New AALegend Component:
- Displays a compact legend of amino acid property groups
- Shows color samples using theme's amino acid color pairs
- Groups: Hydrophobic (AVLIMFWP), Polar (STYNQC), Basic+ (KRH),
  Acidic- (DE), Special (G*)
- Uses representative amino acid from each group for color preview
- Always visible in AA view mode - no interaction required
- Reminds users of the K key for the full AA key overlay

The legend provides the same educational value as hover info but with
zero input handling complexity and consistent behavior across terminal
emulators.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
